summary: The diff implements the vast majority of requirements across both frontend and backend. All five entity types have create dialogs (REQ-1, REQ-3, REQ-5, REQ-7, REQ-9), inline edit forms on detail pages (REQ-2, REQ-4, REQ-6, REQ-8, REQ-10), React Query mutation hooks in useQueries.ts (REQ-12), and backend update endpoints (REQ-11). The backend main.mo is truncated so full verification of REQ-11 details is limited. The ArtistDevelopmentPage create dialog (REQ-9) is referenced via hooks but the page file itself is not shown in the diff. Overall coverage appears strong with minor uncertainties due to truncation.

missing_requirements.requirement: Implement full save (create/persist) functionality for new Artist Development records: the create dialog on ArtistDevelopmentPage must call the backend mutation, validate required fields, show a success toast, close the dialog, and refresh the entries list.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows ArtistDevelopmentDetail.tsx (the edit form for REQ-10) but does not include an ArtistDevelopmentPage.tsx file with the create dialog. The frontend-file-summaries.txt also does not mention ArtistDevelopmentPage. There is no evidence the create dialog for artist development was implemented.
